sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2485" key="ai(mofanh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἱμο-φανής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n2485.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bloodshot</tr_>, of the eye, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
